title: EASTSIDE LEARNING GARDEN - 211info
text: OREGON FOOD BANK EASTSIDE LEARNING GARDEN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a space for beginning and experienced gardeners to work together to grow nutritious fruits and vegetables and learn new gardening skills. Website Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (971) 223-3359 1148 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (971) 223-3359 ext 1148 Adriana Cvitkovic Adriana Cvitkovic Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Community Gardening Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD BANK DISTRIBUTION AND DONATION FOOD - FOOD PANTRY AND MEAL LOCATOR VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEER PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
